# Bug: carto export renders links under the wrong node

> Bug ID: CART-BUG-001
> Severity: major
> Status: 🔴 reported
> Reported: 2026-06-02

## Description

exportMarkdown() filters per-node edges by e.to instead of e.from, so outgoing links are listed under the target node and each arrow points the node back at itself. Reported in BUG_REPORT.md.
